title: China Just Built A Two Brain AI Robot: One Body, Two Minds
summary: A video essay covering recent announcements in humanoid robotics including China's JAKA Pi with a split AI brain architecture, Vietnam's Dyno and VR-H3 humanoids, and NVIDIA's Isaac GR00T platform. The author argues the humanoid robotics race is transitioning from demonstrations to real-world deployment across manufacturing, security, and domestic applications.
